mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AD_INQUIRIES ( AD_ID, BRAND_NAME, MANAGER_NAME, COMPANY_EMAIL, PHONE, CONTENT, START_DATE, END_DATE, DURATION_WEEKS, AMOUNT, FILE_PATH, AGREED_YN, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( AD_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{brandName}, #{managerName}, #{companyEmail}, #{phone}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{durationWeeks}, #{amount}, #{filePath}, #{agreedYn}, 'WAIT', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NAME as userName, EMAIL as email, PHONE as phone, REG_DATE as regDate, STATUS as status, IDLE as idle, SUSPENDED as suspended, MANNER_TEMP as mannerTemp FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TRUNC(REG_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE status = 0

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_price AS productPrice, p.seller_email AS sellerEmail, p.category_no AS categoryNo, p.trade_status AS tradeStatus, p.reg_date AS regDate, m.nickname AS sellerNickname FROM products p JOIN member m ON p.seller_email = m.email ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
